name: critical-thinking-for-humans
description: A gym for your critical thinking. The AI coaches; you train. Four modes (drill, scene, expedition, detective) across distinct reasoning stances, with a longitudinal passport on your machine.

plugins.name: critical-thinking-for-humans
plugins.description: Four modes: drill (13 argument structures, judge stance), scene (Socratic frames + fallacy-recognition track), expedition (audit verified impossible-tier packs), detective (runtime-generated multi-layer case). Manipulation-recognition domain, fourteen redlines, local passport.
